question: Operators flagged a short window of unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days. First identify the sensor channels installed on this asset, then run an anomaly check and trend analysis on the winding temperature channel (winding_temp_top_c) to determine whether the deviations form a single burst or a sustained shift.
answer: The unusual top-of-winding temperature readings on T-014 over the last few days are likely caused by a sustained shift in the sensor reading, rather than a single burst of anomalies. The trend analysis shows a slight upward slope in the readings, indicating a gradual increase in temperature over time. The anomalies detected by the anomaly check are likely due to this sustained shift rather than a single burst of anomalies.
